message:
⚠️ Switch OCP nightly benchmark runners from platform-eval to pokprod01 (#1028)

- Change runs-on from ubuntu-latest to [self-hosted, openshift, pok-prod]
  for both benchmark-standalone and benchmark-modelservice jobs
- Remove kubeconfig secret setup steps (self-hosted runners have cluster
  access via their pre-configured kubeconfig)
- build-image job remains on ubuntu-latest (no cluster access needed)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ jobs:
 
   benchmark-standalone:
     name: Benchmark - Standalone (OCP)
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    runs-on: [self-hosted, openshift, pok-prod]
     needs: build-image
     timeout-minutes: 240
 
@@ -62,13 +62,6 @@ jobs:
         with:
           python-version: "3.12"
 
-      - name: Set up kubeconfig from secret
-        run: |
-          mkdir -p ~/.kube
-          echo "${{ secrets.KUBECONFIG_DATA }}" | base64 -d > ~/.kube/config
-          chmod 600 ~/.kube/config
-        shell: bash
-
       - name: Install llmdbenchmark
         run: |
           ./install.sh -y 2>&1
@@ -174,7 +167,7 @@ jobs:
 
   benchmark-modelservice:
     name: Benchmark - ModelService (OCP)
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    runs-on: [self-hosted, openshift, pok-prod]
     needs: build-image
     timeout-minutes: 240
 
@@ -197,13 +190,6 @@ jobs:
         with:
           python-version: "3.12"
 
-      - name: Set up kubeconfig from secret
-        run: |
-          mkdir -p ~/.kube
-          echo "${{ secrets.KUBECONFIG_DATA }}" | base64 -d > ~/.kube/config
-          chmod 600 ~/.kube/config
-        shell: bash
-
       - name: Install llmdbenchmark
         run: |
           ./install.sh -y 2>&1
